pack_intro: Travel, food, social life, daily routine.

questions.question: Friend texts: 'Cheap flights to Lisbon this weekend!' You...
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes how AI helps with travel — spontaneous vs planned.

options.label: Already packing — let's go!
options.export_rule: I'm a spontaneous traveler. Show me deals and quick options, not detailed itineraries.

options.label: Sounds fun! Let me check calendar and budget first
options.export_rule: I travel flexibly but check logistics first. Help me evaluate feasibility quickly.

options.label: Cool idea, but I'd rather plan it properly for later
options.export_rule: I plan trips in advance. Help me research, compare, and organize itineraries.

options.label: Not my thing — I plan trips months ahead
options.export_rule: I'm a thorough trip planner. Give me detailed comparisons, checklists, and timelines.

questions.question: New restaurant, menu in a language you don't speak. You...
questions.why_this_matters: Tells AI your food adventure level — affects meal recommendations.

options.label: Point at something random — adventure!
options.export_rule: I'm adventurous with food. Suggest new things, unusual cuisines, bold flavors.

options.label: Ask the waiter for their favorite
options.export_rule: I'm open to food suggestions but like some guidance. Recommend with brief context.

options.label: Google translate the menu first
options.export_rule: I like to know what I'm eating before trying. Give clear descriptions of dishes.

options.label: I'd rather go somewhere I know
options.export_rule: I prefer familiar foods. Don't push exotic suggestions — stick to what I like.

questions.question: Long work week, Friday evening. Ideal recharge?
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes how AI suggests activities and social plans.

options.label: Friends, dinner, going out
options.export_rule: I recharge through social activity. Suggest group plans and social options.

options.label: Solo — couch, book, silence
options.export_rule: I recharge alone. Don't suggest social activities when I'm tired.

options.label: Small group of close friends
options.export_rule: I prefer small, close gatherings over big social events.

options.label: Depends entirely on the week
options.export_rule: My social needs vary. Check my energy level before suggesting social plans.

questions.question: Sunday evening. Tomorrow is Monday. Your prep looks like...
questions.why_this_matters: Tells AI how structured your life is — shapes planning help.

options.label: What prep? I'll figure it out tomorrow
options.export_rule: I don't plan ahead much. Suggest things in the moment, not for next week.

options.label: Outfit + lunch + to-do list ready
options.export_rule: I like preparation and structure. Help me plan ahead with checklists and schedules.

options.label: Work planned, personal life = wing it
options.export_rule: Structure my work tasks, but keep personal suggestions flexible and spontaneous.

options.label: Full schedule blocked out hour by hour
options.export_rule: I time-block everything. Help me fit things into specific time slots.

questions.question: Any dietary preferences or restrictions?
questions.why_this_matters: Ensures AI never suggests foods you can't or don't eat.

options.label: Vegetarian
options.export_rule: I'm vegetarian. Never suggest meat dishes.

options.label: Vegan
options.export_rule: I'm vegan. No animal products in any food suggestions.

options.label: Low-carb / keto
options.export_rule: I eat low-carb/keto. Prioritize protein and fats in food suggestions.

options.label: Gluten-free
options.export_rule: I'm gluten-free. Always check for gluten in food suggestions.

options.label: Halal
options.export_rule: I eat halal. Respect this in all food-related suggestions.

options.label: Kosher
options.export_rule: I eat kosher. Respect this in all food-related suggestions.

questions.open_text_addon: Any specific allergies or other restrictions?

questions.question: What does your typical morning look like?
questions.why_this_matters: Shapes how AI times suggestions and plans your day.

options.label: Structured routine — same every day (workout, coffee, plan)
options.export_rule: I have a structured morning routine. Don't suggest morning tasks that would disrupt it.

options.label: Flexible — depends on mood and energy
options.export_rule: My mornings vary. Adapt morning suggestions to my current energy.

options.label: What morning? I start late and slow
options.export_rule: I'm not a morning person. Don't suggest early tasks or assume I'm productive before noon.

options.label: Chaotic — different every day, no pattern
options.export_rule: My mornings are unpredictable. Don't assume any morning routine or schedule.
